zh.Braine, Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, Franc: 法國皮卡迪艾斯索頌斯布萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean Ier de Dreux於大約1215年出生在法國艾-吉洛易德時，他的父親Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux31歲，母親Aliénor de Saint-Valéry24歲。他於1240年4月與Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1248年8月25日在塞浦路斯尼科西亞享年34歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪艾斯布萊。

zh-hans.Braine, Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, Franc: 法国皮卡迪艾斯索頌斯布萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean Ier de Dreux于大约1215年出生在法国艾-吉洛易德时，他的父亲Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux31岁，母亲Aliénor de Saint-Valéry24岁。他于1240年4月与Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1248年8月25日在塞浦路斯尼科西亞享年34岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪艾斯布萊。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Druce
meanings: English: variant of   Drewes  , a surname of French origin.
Possibly an altered form of Dutch and German   Drewes  .

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Jean Ier de Dreux was born about 1215, in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, France, his father, Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux, was 31 and his mother, Aliénor de Saint-Valéry, was 24. He married Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre in April 1240. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 August 1248, in Nicosia, Cyprus, at the age of 34, and was buried in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean Ier de Dreux est né environ 1215, à Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, France, son père, Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Aliénor de Saint-Valéry, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre en avril 1240. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 août 1248, à Nicosia, Chypre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean Ier de Dreux um 1215 in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux 31 und seine Mutter Aliénor de Saint-Valéry 24. Er hat im April 1240 Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. August 1248 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Nicosia, Zypern und wurde in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Ier de Dreux è nato il circa 1215 nel Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, il suo padre, Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Aliénor de Saint-Valéry, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre nel aprile 1240. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 agosto 1248, nel Nicosia, Cipro, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.

ja.Dreux, Eure-Et-Loire, France: フランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルドレウックス

ja.Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France: フランスエウレ-エト-ロイルドレウックス
ja.lifeSummary: Jean Ier de Dreuxが約1215年にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルドレウックスで生まれた時，父Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreuxは31歳，母Aliénor de Saint-Valéryは24歳であった。1240年4月にMarie de Bourbon-Dampierreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1248年8月25日にキプロスニコシアで34歳で死去し，フランスピカーディエイスンブレアインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean Ier de Dreux(이)가 대략 1215년 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 드레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Aliénor de Saint-Valéry(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1240년 4월 Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1248년 8월 25일 키프로스 니코샤에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 브레이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Ier de Dreux nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, França, seu pai, Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Aliénor de Saint-Valéry, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre em abril de 1240. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1248, em Nicosia, Chipre, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Braine, Aisne, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean Ier de Dreux родился около 1215 г. в местности дреукс, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Aliénor de Saint-Valéry, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre апрель 1240 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 августа 1248 г. в местности никося, Кипр в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности бреаин, эисн, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean Ier de Dreux nació aproximadamente 1215, en Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, su papá, Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Aliénor de Saint-Valéry, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre en abril de 1240. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de agosto de 1248, en Nicosia, Chipre, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.
